---
id: get-reports
title: 'Get reports'
description: ''
sidebar_label: 'Get reports'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'get api-method'
info_path: theolive/api/reports/reports
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get reports'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: 'startingAfter',
      in: 'query',
      description:
        'Optional string which should contain an ID of a report after which the list should start. Reports are sorted by creation date, oldest first.',
      schema: { type: 'string' },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: {
            Result: {
              value:
                '[\n  {\n  "reportId": "id-of-report",\n    "channelIds": [\n        "channel-id"\n    ],\n    "end": "end-datetime",\n    "name": "name-report",\n    "start": "start-datetime",\n    "reportUrl": "url"\n}\n]',
            },
          },
          schema: {
            type: 'array',
            items: {
              type: 'object',
              properties: {
                reportId: { type: 'string', example: 'id-of-report' },
                channelIds: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', example: 'channel-id' } },
                end: { type: 'string', example: 'end-datetime' },
                name: { type: 'string', example: 'name-report' },
                start: { type: 'string', example: 'start-datetime' },
                reportUrl: { type: 'string', example: 'url' },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    '400': {
      description: '400',
      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
